'''Sacred Arts''' is one of the magic systems of the Willverse.

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Sacred Arts represent a field of practice and knowledge focused on refining the [[spirit]] to achieve a connection with all creation. Practitioners use these arts to manipulate the world by utilizing [[madra]], which serves as their internal power and the raw material of souls. This resource can be circulated through a practitioner's limbs, cycled, refined, or exhausted. As artists advance through various realms, they develop a [[madra]]-reinforced constitution. 

A significant milestone in progression is the [[Iron stage]], which follows the [[Copper]] level. Advancing to [[Iron]] involves forging the body and expelling impurities, resulting in an [[Iron body]] that provides superhuman physical attributes such as enhanced speed and improved vision. The ultimate goal of any practitioner's path is the [[Gold stage]]. A [[Gold]] master has understood [[madra]] secrets beyond mortal [[dreams]], possessing a body that is partially composed of [[madra]]. 

Different disciplines exist within the arts, such as the [[Path of the White Fox]] used by many in the [[Wei clan]]. This specific path focuses on cultivating light and [[aspects]] of [[dreams]] to twist sound, create illusions, and deceive the senses of enemies. 

Another notable phenomenon is the emergence of [[Remnants]]. When humans or animals advance in power and subsequently die, they leave behind their souls as living forces of [[pure madra]]. These [[Remnants]] appear as bright emerald sketches or outlines rather than accurate depictions. While some may take specific shapes, such as a purple skeletal tree-[[Remnant]], they are essentially constructions of [[madra]] that can be utilized for tasks like pulling carriages. Additionally, [[Soulsmiths]] have the ability to mold substances or items known as [[Remnants]].}}

== Techniques ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[soulfire]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Striker technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Ruler technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Empty Palm]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Burning Cloak]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Enforcer technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Hollow Domain]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[black dragon's breath]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Soul Cloak]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Endless Sword]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Path of Black Flame]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Heart of Twin Stars]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Bloodforged Iron body]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Striker techniques]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Forger technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Strings of Shadow]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Consume]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Copper sight]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Soulsmithing]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Void Dragon’s Dance]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Steelborn body]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[dragon’s breath]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Soulfire]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[hunger binding]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Foxfire]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Stellar Spear]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Path of Grasping Sky]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Rippling Sword]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Final Sword]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Dragon Descends]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dream of Darkness]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Enforce]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Hollow Spear]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Pure Storm Baptism]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Blood Shadows]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Enforcer techniques]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Full-body Enforcer technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Fox Dream]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Ruler techniques]]}}

== Madra & aura ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[hunger madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Forged madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Blackflame madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[dream aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[vital aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[blood madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Wind aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Blood aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[hunger aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[death-madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[earth aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[dream madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[sword aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[shadow madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[force madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[life madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Storm madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Life aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[White Fox]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[fire aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[sword madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[shadow aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Hunger aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Stellar Spear madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[water aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[venomous green madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[water madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[King’s Key madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[hunger]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[cloud madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Twin Stars]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Blood madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[venom aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Sword-aspect madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[light aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Sandviper madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[purple madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Blackflame aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Endless Sword madra]]}}

== Goldsigns ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Goldsign]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin's Goldsigns]]}}

== Sacred arts & Paths ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Sword Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[script-circle]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Grand Oath Array]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[scripts]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[White Fox boundary formation]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Hammer Icon]]}}

== Icons ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shield Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Bow Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Strength Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Death Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Joy Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Arelius crest]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Oracle Icon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Crown Icon]]}}

[[Category:Magic systems]]
